generated_oml:
instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Position encoder mounted directly on the motor shaft of the MABI MAX 100 industrial robot's first axis"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorEncoderData
]

instance GearboxEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary position encoder positioned behind the gearbox to measure transmission errors of the MABI MAX 100 industrial robot's first axis"
    DTDFVocab:producedData GearboxEncoderData
]

instance MotorEncoderData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
    base:desc "Time series position data from motor encoder transmitted via MQTT protocol"
]

instance GearboxEncoderData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GearboxEncoder
    base:desc "Time series transmission error data from gearbox encoder transmitted via MQTT protocol"
]

instance MotorEncoderRawData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw position data from motor encoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance GearboxEncoderRawData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw transmission error data from gearbox encoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxEncoderData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance AggregatedDataPoints : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Aggregated sensor data points for friction modeling"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderRawData, GearboxEncoderRawData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance ContextualDataTraces : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Contextual data traces including operational environment information"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderRawData, GearboxEncoderRawData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance AnalyticalFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Physics-based analytical friction model for the MABI MAX 100 robot's first axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance DataDrivenFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Data-driven friction model trained on operational sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance SysMLModelingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML for system structure and behavior modeling across requirements, functional, logical, and technical layers"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService, DashboardVisualizationService, LiveDataLinkingService
]

instance ACMEArchitectureEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ACME Architecture Description Language for component and connector perspectives"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService, DashboardVisualizationService, LiveDataLinkingService
]

instance AADLArchitectureEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "AADL Architecture Description Language for component and connector perspectives"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService, DashboardVisualizationService, LiveDataLinkingService
]

instance MontiArcArchitectureEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MontiArc Architecture Description Language for component and connector perspectives"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService, DashboardVisualizationService, LiveDataLinkingService
]

instance SimulinkSimulationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks Simulink for detailed simulation and code generation in C++/Java"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService, DashboardVisualizationService, LiveDataLinkingService
]

instance CppJavaBehaviorEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "General-purpose programming languages (C++, Java) for behavior description"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService, DashboardVisualizationService, LiveDataLinkingService
]

instance LiveDataLinkingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time synchronization between physical and digital entities via MQTT"
    DTDFVocab:provides JointFrictionInsight, OperationalMonitoringInsight
]

instance DashboardVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Dashboard interface for operational monitoring and visualization"
    DTDFVocab:provides OperationalMonitoringInsight
]

instance FrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Algorithm for identifying joint friction to optimize motion control processes"
    DTDFVocab:provides JointFrictionInsight
]

instance JointFrictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time joint friction identification for motion control optimization"
]

instance OperationalMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Dashboard visualization of operational data for monitoring"
]

instance MabiMax100FirstAxis : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "First axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot driven by permanent magnet synchronous motor and gearbox"
]

instance MachiningEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Machining domain environment for the MABI MAX 100 industrial robot"
    base:contains MabiMax100FirstAxis
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin maintains real-time synchronization with the physical system through continuous ingestion of live sensor data streams, capturing time-series data at high temporal resolution to ensure an accurate and up-to-date digital representation."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system employs a Digital Shadow Reference Model (DSRM) architecture, integrating DataTrace, Processing, and Model components. It uses SysML for structural modeling and Asset Administration Shells (AAS) for standardized interoperability, enabling coordinated resource management and seamless integration of heterogeneous system elements."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin lifecycle stages involve Model-Based Systems Engineering (MBSE) during the development phase, where modeling is split into distinct levels of abstraction: requirements, functional architecture, logical architecture, and product/technical layer. Methodologies such as RFLP (Requirements, Functions, Logics, Physics), OOSEM, SPES, and SMArDT are used to manage complexity across these stages."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol is used for data transmission between physical and digital components. No details on network topology, bandwidth, latency, reliability mechanisms, or security protocols are provided in the document."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Integration with external systems utilizes Asset Administration Shells (AAS) for standardized data exchange and MQTT protocol for sensor data streaming. The system interfaces with the Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl robot controller to facilitate real-time control and data synchronization."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Compliance with industry standards including SysML [17], AADL [24], ACME [23], MontiArc [25], [26], and integration with MathWorks Simulink [28] for model-based simulation and code generation."
]
